segments.label: Lucky Again
segments.message: The wheel remembers you. Fortune tilts your way — woot.

segments.label: Star Light
segments.message: Clear sky protocol active. Hope is operational, not decorative.

segments.label: Yes Path
segments.message: The road opens. Proceed — convergence favors you.

segments.label: Wheel Turns
segments.message: Cycle shift detected. What stalled moves without force.

segments.label: Safe Harbor
segments.message: You are held. Rest inside the outcome already forming.

segments.label: Double Signal
segments.message: Two confirmations incoming. Trust the repeat.

segments.label: Tower Clear
segments.message: False structure falls. Good architecture remains.

segments.label: Moon Pass
segments.message: Fog lifts at its own pace. Don't rush the reveal.

segments.label: Pause · Align
segments.message: Not denial — calibration. The yes is still forming.

segments.label: Wild Card
segments.message: Unmapped blessing. Stay open — luck wears a mask.
